mapper.select:
SELECT d.* FROM t_diary d WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 2 AND d.visible = 1
AND (d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY d.like_count DESC, d.create_time DESC
ORDER BY d.comment_count DESC, d.create_time DESC
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
